categories.label: Victory Point Track
categories.description: Current position on the VP track (including 100/200 marker)

categories.label: Lever Bonus
categories.description: 2 VP per lever (4-6 levers) or 3 VP per lever (7+ levers)

categories.label: Played Card End-Game Effects
categories.description: VP from end-game symbols on played project cards

categories.label: Tier 3 Removals
categories.description: 2 VP per wooden piece removed from the 3rd tier of your player board

categories.label: Tier 4 Removals
categories.description: 4 VP per wooden piece removed from the 4th tier of your player board

categories.label: Tier 5 Removals
categories.description: 6 VP per wooden piece removed from the 5th tier of your player board
